title: Dukette Halberds
description: This is a resourcepack that turns PuckiSilver's multitool datapack, into halberds. This is an updated version with new hand positions to make more sense than the previous version, and be more comfortable to the eye. Some textures has also been updated.
body: # **Halberd Multitools** Do you just **love** the idea of using a multitool, but you struggle to properly find an appearance you like? Do you use Puckisilvers multitool, because you find it works the best for you, but you hate the switching between tools? Then this resourcepack might be for you! ## **How to use** Once you have PuckiSilver's multitool datapack working, you can simply put this resourcepack on the top layer, and every multitool will become a halberd, where you use the beak as a hoe and pickaxe, the axe as an... an axe and the speartip as a shovel. The original I published on planetminecraft, but these are retextured to fit the newer versions better, and I replace the sword that was on the top, with a shovel, as both look well as spearheads. ## Would you rather have halberds, without using a datapack? I've published *another* halberd resourcepack that works independent from the datapack, with their own cool textures <3 ## Halberds from the pack ![Alternative Halberds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/N597mEfz/images/887080e79fca0ab239889d94fdef71cb48aaaedc.png) You can click the icon underneath to be redirected to another modrinth page, with the other resourcepack ^^ - - ![Alternative Halberds](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/xtt4wSaz/images/0c4e034c8a739c506cf165b678f398d7a3d59d21.png) --- **You can find my other stuff here**
